---
author: "Антон Ангельгардт"
---

# Числа {#ch-apx-numbers}

{{< include ../../../../shared/includes/math-symbols.qmd >}}

```{r opts, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, error = TRUE, cache = TRUE)
```

:::{.intro}
приложение о числах
:::

## Натуральные числа {#sec-numbers-setN}
